title: AI Builder
must_haves: Generalist ENGINEER across research/product/forward-deployed: build agents, train models, set up eval matrices, create RL environments
Experience in applied ML, reinforcement learning, product engineering, and/or top-tier management consulting
Build & productionize integrated training+inference stack for RL-based agents; write PRs to core platform
Work directly with enterprise CXOs to translate problems into productizable AI systems
hard_blockers: Hard technical gate: applied ML / RL / production engineering — Ryan builds agents at operator level (Claude Code), not production ML/RL/SWE
'Generalist engineer' who writes PRs to core platform and trains models — production SWE/ML depth Ryan lacks
Elite pedigree team (Olympiad medalists, ex-Palantir founders, McKinsey/KKR/Google/HBS)
met_strengths: Genuine hands-on agentic-AI building enthusiasm (Claude Code agents)
one_line_verdict: Titled 'Builder' but it's fundamentally an applied-ML/RL/production-engineering + top-tier-consulting role — Ryan's operator-level agent-building doesn't clear the technical/pedigree gate.
fetch_note: Confirmed open via Ashby API (hyde slug). Hyde = applied AI lab deploying RL-based agents for Global 500s; Bain Capital Ventures & General Catalyst backed; NYC/London/Mumbai. Role explicitly an engineer/applied-ML or top-tier-consulting hire.
